_meta.title: Edge cases
_meta.fixture_purpose: Exercises the pain points from v1: IG embed sizing, image-in-columns cascade, gated paywall, empty embed in editor mode, nested-columns validation rejection.

blocks.html: This fixture exercises the bugs we hit in v1. Each block exists to verify that the v2 architecture handles a class of problem the legacy system mishandled.

blocks.caption: Instagram embed — should size to its reported height (~152px for a fake URL, ~600px for a real post), not collapse to 0 because of absolute positioning.
001 Inside a column, the image-caption should normalize chrome (no padding/border/background) UNLESS the dash overrides it explicitly.
002 Same here. Pair should look uniform.

blocks.html: Everything above this is public. Below is gated.
This text only renders if the viewer satisfies tier looth-pro. In editor mode, admins see a 'paywall preview' badge here.

blocks._test_note: In editor mode, this should render the inline URL form with a contracted submit handler — NOT a native form that falls through silently.

_test_invalid_input_example.comment: This sibling structure documents what the validator MUST reject. It is not loaded as part of the fixture. The render-test harness exercises this as a separate negative test case.

blocks.html: This nested columns block must be rejected.
